session.assistant:
## Plan execution complete
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9114
**Summary of changes** — single file modified: `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py`
1. Added `--include-learn` flag to `pr_filter_options()` shared decorator 2. `_pr_list_impl()` now accepts `include_learn` and computes `exclude_labels=("erk-learn",)` by default (matching TUI behavior) 3. `_run_interactive_mode()` same treatment — excludes learn plans by default 4. Wired `include_learn` through both `pr_list` and `dash` command functions
**Behavior**: - `erk pr list` — now excludes learn plans (matches TUI PRs tab) - `erk pr list --include-learn` — shows all plans including learn - `erk dash` — now excludes learn plans by default - `erk dash --include-learn` — shows all plans including learn
All CI checks pass (5978 unit tests, lint, format, type checks).
